what_it_does: A .gitignore for the Supabase project directory that excludes CLI-generated state (.branches, .temp) and local secret/env files (.env.keys, .env.local, .env.*.local) from version control.
observations: Two grouped sections with comments: '# Supabase' (.branches, .temp) and '# dotenvx' (.env.keys, .env.local, .env.*.local).
Matches the default ignore patterns the Supabase CLI scaffolds.
Explicitly ignores .branches, which is consistent with the sibling _current_branch file being CLI state rather than tracked config.
conventions: Follows the standard Supabase CLI .gitignore template, including dotenvx env-key exclusions.
notes: Standard Supabase-scaffolded .gitignore keeping CLI state and dotenvx secrets out of git.
apparent_themes: Keeping generated state and secrets out of version control
intention_signals: Aims to prevent committing transient CLI state and sensitive environment/key files for the Supabase project.
contribution: Contributes the version-control exclusion rules for the Supabase project's generated state and secret env files.
summary_for_embedding: A Supabase project .gitignore excluding CLI state directories (.branches, .temp) and dotenvx secret/env files from version control.
intention_for_embedding: To keep transient Supabase CLI state and local secret env files out of git for this project.
